article_meta.title: Air Force One returns to Washington area due to minor electrical issue, White House says 1 of 4 | President Donald Trump

reasoning: The source article is from the Associated Press and is already relatively neutral in tone. The model's summary maintains this neutrality well. It uses phrases like 'according to official statements' and 'The White House characterized' which properly attribute claims. The phrase 'out of an abundance of caution' is directly from the White House statement and is presented as such. The summary doesn't introduce loaded language or editorial framing. Minor note: 'precautionary return was presented as a standard safety measure rather than an emergency situation' is slightly interpretive but is a reasonable characterization of the White House framing.

custom_reasoning.spin: All verbs are neutral: 'returned,' 'identified,' 'stated,' 'characterized.' No loaded verbs anywhere.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All claims are attributed to either the White House or AP reporting. No unsupported assertions.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: No subjective judgments presented as fact. The characterization of the issue as 'minor' is properly attributed to the White House.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Language is measured and clinical throughout. No dramatic or alarming language.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or character judgments of any kind.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No claims about anyone's thoughts or motivations.
custom_reasoning.slant: The article itself presents essentially one perspective (the White House account) and the summary reflects this proportionally.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: The source article is straightforward news with essentially one perspective. The summary captures the main facts. No significant omissions, though the article itself has very little to omit.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: No loaded adjectives. 'Minor' is used but attributed to the White House characterization.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Language is politically neutral throughout. No loaded terms.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: The summary matches the source's balanced tone - reporting an incident without dramatizing it.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: The summary relies heavily on the White House as the primary source, but this matches the source article which is based on official statements. Slight deference to official sources but appropriate given the article content.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: The summary is neutral and uses appropriate attribution. The phrase 'presented as a standard safety measure rather than an emergency situation' adds useful context without editorializing.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: The article only really presents one perspective (the White House account via AP reporting) and the summary captures this. sources_represented correctly identifies both the White House and AP.
